# Proof Flow Diagram

```text
Proxy signal exists
       ↓
Allocation rule uses proxy
       ↓
Proxy can be artificially shifted
       ↓
Shift changes rank / belief / payout / attribution under explicit assumptions
       ↓
Feedback or social proof can multiply effect
       ↓
Empirical studies show humans and systems respond to these proxies
       ↓
Therefore manufactured traction is not just plausible; it is a mathematically predictable failure mode of proxy-governed markets
```

## One-line proof

If `allocation = f(proxy)` and `f` is increasing, then manipulating `proxy` manipulates allocation whenever the proxy change is large enough to cross a decision boundary.
